articles.title: People’s March contributes to Congress’s people-centric governance, accessibility to govt fully ensured: Bhatti on three years of padayatra
articles.description: Two and a half years into the Congress Government’s tenure in Telangana, Deputy Chief Minister Bhatti Vikramarka Mallu reflects on how the ‘People’s March’ (padayatra) he had undertaken from March 16, 2023 from Pippiri village in Boath constituency of Adilabad district covering 1,364 kms touching 37 assembly constituencies has shaped governance. The mass contact programme created a direct bond with citizens and laid the foundation for the Praja Palana (People’s Governance) model. In an exclusive interview to The Hindu, Mr. Bhatti explains how promises made during the march — on housing, agriculture, education, employment, and irrigation — are being implemented, and how the Six Guarantees continue to anchor welfare delivery despite fiscal challenges

topStories.description: A 6.0 magnitude quake struck off Indonesia's remote northern Talaud islands on Saturday, the US Geological Survey (USGS) said, but there were no immediate reports of casualties or damage.

dailyNews.title: Plea in Supreme Court challenges 2026 Transgender Rights Amendment, says it causes ‘irreparable constitutional injury’
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court petition challenges 2026 Transgender Rights Amendment passed by Parliament

dailyNews.title: Over 30 universities hit by US-Israeli strikes since February 28, says Iranian Science Minister
dailyNews.description: Iranian media reported that American and Israeli aircraft targeted various strategic and civilian sites in Tehran on Friday afternoon, including the Shahid Beheshti University

dailyNews.title: ‘Do not intend to seek permission’: Russia sends strong message on oil sales, calls it ‘matter of national sovereignty’
dailyNews.description: Oil rallied Thursday after Trump vowed an escalation in the conflict against Iran over the coming weeks – which could disrupt energy flows through the vital Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: War of words intensifies in poll-bound Assam
dailyNews.description: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma says top Congress leaders will have to be reborn to put him behind bars

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Bo Bennett on making mistakes: ‘Our mistakes don’t define us, it is how we…'
dailyNews.description: The quote tells us to not get bowed down by the mistakes we make – doesn't matter where – because that's not what defines us. What defines us is how we learn from those mistakes.

dailyNews.title: Attacks on nuclear facilities ‘will end life’ in gulf cities not Tehran: Iran’s FM after US-Israel strikes on Bushehr
dailyNews.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi warned that further strikes on the Bushehr nuclear power plant could lead to radioactive fallout affecting GCC capitals. He slammed Western silence over the attacks, which he claims have occurred multiple times.

dailyNews.title: Congress leader Ibobi urges Centre to delay Manipur census till normalcy is restored
dailyNews.description: Ibobi Singh urges Centre to defer Census in Manipur, citing displacement, data accuracy concerns and ongoing law and order challenges.

dailyNews.title: Projectile hits near Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant, killing one: IAEA
dailyNews.description: Tehran says it is the fourth attack near the nuclear plant amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day: John D. Rockefeller urges bold choices — ‘Don’t be afraid to give up…’
dailyNews.description: Rockefeller’s words remind us to think big and act with courage. They encourage people to trust their abilities, embrace change, and not fear leaving their comfort zone.

dailyNews.title: Blindfolded, Made To Kneel: What Happened Last Time Iran Held US Personnel
dailyNews.description: Iran shot down a US F-15E fighter jet, marking the first confirmed loss of an American aircraft inside Iranian territory since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Ray Dalio: Why investors chase the past
dailyNews.description: American billionnare Ray Dalio's quote is really a warning against recency bias—the habit of mistaking what has just worked for what will keep working.

dailyNews.description: A 6.0 magnitude quake struck off Indonesia's remote northern Talaud islands on Saturday, the US Geological Survey (USGS) said, but there were no immediate reports of casualties or damage.

dailyNews.title: 'Baseless': Pakistan Rejects Claims Of Failed US-Iran Mediation Bid
dailyNews.description: Islamabad says media misread briefing amid rising tensions; insists outreach between Washington and Tehran is still underway.

dailyNews.title: Amid War With Iran, UAE Asks Pakistan To Repay $2 Billion Loan: Report
dailyNews.description: The UAE recently asked for the immediate return of the funds in the wake of the recent situation in the Middle East following the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: What we know so far about the search for missing US airman in Iran
dailyNews.description: US and Iranian forces are searching for a missing American crew member after a US warplane was shot down.

dailyNews.title: Bikaner Bhujia may get pricier: US-Iran war disrupts namkeen exports to Gulf, Europe
dailyNews.description: The manufacturers of Bikaner's namkeen industry now fear that the economic instability caused by the US-Iran war in West Asia may increase the costs of the products.

dailyNews.title: 'Definitely carried out by Zionists': Iran denies involvement in attack on US Embassy in Riyadh
dailyNews.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps condemned the March attack on the US embassy in Riyadh, denying involvement and blaming Israel. Following drone strikes on Oman, Iran claimed these were ‘false flag’ operations. Tensions rise as Iran rejects a US ceasefire proposal amid escalating conflict.

dailyNews.title: Iran shoots down two US jets: Ex-airmen explains how ‘downed’ pilot must avoid enemy capture
dailyNews.description: In a rare assault against the US, Iran reportedly shot down two American military aircraft on Friday — F15-E Strike Eagle fighter jet and A-10 attack aircraft. How will the “missing” pilot avoid enemy capture? Ex-airmen explains.

dailyNews.title: Trump seeks $152m to reopen notorious Alcatraz prison
dailyNews.description: Former Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi calls the plan a "stupid notion that would be nothing more than a waste of taxpayer dollars".

dailyNews.title: EU finance ministers push for windfall profit tax on energy firms as Iran war drives fuel prices higher
dailyNews.description: Five EU finance ministers have called for a windfall tax on energy companies due to rising fuel prices linked to the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Details here.

dailyNews.title: Rescue team in Iran face 'harrowing and dangerous' search for US crew member
dailyNews.description: A former US marine tells the BBC the priority of any recovery team would be to look for signs of life.

dailyNews.title: Iran executes two convicted members of banned opposition group
dailyNews.description: Abolhassan Montazer and Vahid Baniamerian have been hanged after Iran's Supreme Court upheld their sentences.

dailyNews.title: US-Israeli strikes hit Iran’s Mahshahr petrochemical zone – All you need to know
dailyNews.description: US and Israeli strikes targeted a petrochemical complex in southwestern Iran, affecting multiple companies. Iranian media reported explosions in Mahshahr's Special Petrochemical Zone, with damage details still unclear.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods' entire sobriety test caught on bodycam footage: 'I'm getting arrested?'
dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods was arrested after a lengthy sobriety test despite blowing triple-zeroes on a breathalyzer. He says he is stepping away to seek treatment.

topStories.description: Linda McMahon discusses President Donald Trump's directive to fire herself by dismantling the Department of Education, calling out critics driven by "Trump Derangement Syndrome."

topStories.title: Alcatraz could reopen as a 'state-of-the-art secure prison' under Trump's $152M budget request
topStories.description: The White House is seeking $152 million to reopen Alcatraz, closed since 1963, as a state-of-the-art secure facility for federal inmates.

topStories.title: FIRST LADY MELANIA TRUMP: AI could improve teaching and help deliver a world-class education to our children
topStories.description: Here's how AI-powered tutoring tools can democratize education for underserved communities in America, giving all children personalized access to elite-level academics.

topStories.title: Trump Pledged a Quick End to the Iran War, but He Hasn’t Explained How
topStories.description: President Trump bet that American firepower could cow Iran into compliance. So far, Iran’s leaders have been unwilling to quit.

topStories.title: New Attorney General, Same Albatross: Trump’s Quest for Retribution
topStories.description: The name atop the Justice Department’s organizational chart matters less than the presence of a president whose demands for revenge have become so extreme that even his most obsequious appointees have fallen short.

topStories.title: Trump Contemplates Other Cabinet Changes as He Faces Political Clock
topStories.description: With the midterms approaching, the president may be running out of time to get new cabinet members confirmed without bipartisan support.

topStories.title: Trump Budget Does Little to Address Nation’s Fiscal Challenges
topStories.description: While the federal deficit has started to shrink under President Trump, his plans could make the long-term situation worse.

topStories.description: The convicted sex offender gave Anil Ambani information on appointments and foreign policy. Some seemed prescient, though there was no evidence he was close to the administration.

dailyNews.description: Trump girls gone wild — or just gone.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Relentless, ‘Utterly Incoherent’ Battles
dailyNews.description: A look at a conflict without end and a constitution under pressure.

dailyNews.title: Arrest of Wisconsin Mosque Leader Was Tied to Trump Antisemitism Campaign
dailyNews.description: Immigration lawyers and former federal officials say the case of Salah Sarsour echoes those against other pro-Palestinian activists.

dailyNews.title: Did Trump help write the latest White House East Wing court filing?
dailyNews.description: The government's legal bid to continue East Wing construction has the hallmarks of President Trump's social media posts.

dailyNews.title: Lawmakers react to White House's massive defense spending proposal
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers are reacting to the Trump administration's request for a $1.5 trillion in defense spending for 2027 as the war with Iran intensifies.

dailyNews.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
dailyNews.description: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: Trump is considering more changes to his Cabinet in the coming weeks
dailyNews.description: In his first year back in the White House, President Donald Trump avoided using his famous “You’re fired” phrase when it came to members of his Cabinet.

dailyNews.title: Trump signs memo directing DHS to pay all employees during shutdown
dailyNews.description: The president signed a similar memo last week directing pay for TSA workers.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires another top official, and NASA launches a moon shot: The news quiz
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court has a lone dissenter, gas prices spike, and the World Cup is missing an icon.

dailyNews.title: Firings in Trump 1.0 vs Trump 2.0
dailyNews.description: NBC News' Garrett Haake joins "Here's the Scoop" to discuss what the nexts steps might be for President Trump after the recent firings of Kristi Noem and Pam Bondi.
